title: Fix: CRLF injection vulnerability
original_text: Fixed CRLF injection vulnerability in HTTP headers. Implemented CRLF sequence sanitization. Added input validation for user-supplied headers. Implemented HTTP header encoding. Added CRLF injection detection. Result: CRLF injection vulnerability fixed.
expected_body_lines: - Add input validation for user-supplied headers
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(security): fix CRLF injection vulnerability"
